scripts.dbt-run: uv run dbt run --project-dir dbt --profiles-dir dbt
scripts.dbt-test: uv run dbt test --project-dir dbt --profiles-dir dbt
scripts.dbt-docs: uv run dbt docs generate --project-dir dbt --profiles-dir dbt
scripts.pipeline: uv run python extract.py && uv run dbt run --project-dir dbt --profiles-dir dbt && uv run dbt test --project-dir dbt --profiles-dir dbt
